label: OpenAgentic Chat
description: Conversational LLM via the platform's Smart Router. Same shape as openagentic_llm — supports modelOverride, sliderPosition, and chain-of-thought thinking.

settings.name: modelOverride
settings.label: Model override
settings.description: Leave blank to use Smart Router (auto). Hard-coded model IDs are discouraged.

ai.shortDescription: Smart-Router LLM chat (same shape as openagentic_llm).
ai.whenToUse: When you need conversational LLM output and want the platform's Smart Router to pick the model.
ai.examplePrompt: have OpenAgentic Chat answer the user's last question with platform-routed inference
ai.promptHints: Reference the response with {{steps.<id>.content}}. Leave modelOverride blank so Smart Router picks.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: OpenAgentic Chat returned an empty completion.

outputAssertions.name: agent_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || !result.content || !result.content.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: LLM returned a refusal or 'no info' response — likely upstream tool/search returned no results. Investigate the previous step rather than treating this as a successful completion.
